landing_hero_description: Deploy retrieval-augmented generation and medical imaging AI at scale. Real-time diagnosis support in Arabic, French, and English with verified source evidence and explainable confidence scoring.
landing_core_features_desc: Built for practical, explainable healthcare decision support.
landing_how_it_works_desc: A streamlined pipeline for multilingual consultation and imaging analysis.
landing_disclaimer: This system is designed for educational and decision-support purposes only. It does not replace professional medical diagnosis. Always consult a qualified healthcare provider.
landing_production_config: Production Configuration: This system combines live service integration with automatic fallback to local models. Streaming responses are available for real-time feedback, and the platform is continuously monitored.
landing_footer_line1: Production-Ready RAG System with Real-Time Insights
landing_footer_line2: Modern web platform • secure retrieval • medical AI • streaming responses
footer_research_only: AI assistant for research purposes only.
